# onelogin_role (Resource)

Manages a OneLogin Role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "onelogin_role" "example" {
  name = "Engineering"

  apps   = [12345, 67890]
  users  = [111, 222, 333]
  admins = [111]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role.

### Optional

- `admins` (Set of Number) A set of user IDs who administer this role.
- `apps` (Set of Number) A set of app IDs accessible by this role.
- `users` (Set of Number) A set of user IDs assigned to this role.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the role.
